description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a pages job (default stage test) that runs the exact command `hugo`, publishes the `public` directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch via an only rule. Add a test job (default stage test) that also runs `hugo` but is excluded from the master branch with an except rule. Both jobs inherit the same image and variable settings, and the pages job deploys to GitLab Pages.
